title: Secret Killer Leads Cops Into His Murder Shed
description:
Going to therapy is a sign of strength, not weakness. My sponsor BetterHelp makes therapy simple, with 10% off your first month to help you get started: https://betterhelp.com/DrInsanity

----
19-year-old Dylan Rounds left his family to go work on his farm…

But after being spotted buying supplies at a local shop, he would vanish without a trace…

Strangely, no one in the small, quiet town seemed surprised… Apparently, this was not uncommon…

As days stretched into weeks, detectives chased a mounting list of suspects….. Thieves, violent criminals, drug dealers….

Yet from the very beginning, the truth was there… hidden in plain sight, by someone no one suspected….
----
